title: Enchanted Lib
body:
# Enchanted Lib
## Summary
This mod is just a library used by my mods.
This mod has some features if installed alone, bewary.
## Features
Custom Enchantment Level Naming from ```Integer.MIN VALUE``` to ```Integer.MAX VALUE```
Potions Level Displaying Fixed For Client. Can now enter up to ```Integer.MAX VALUE``` for amplifier level on /effect.
New Enchantment Rarity. Does not override or touch the existing vanilla.
## Note
If you want the features of this mod alone, you can install it alone. However, if you want the nbt tags to work, you must install Enchanted Effects.
For those who want to use this library as their dependency, I do not yet have a maven repository. However, I do not recommend using this library as I haven't optimized the code it uses. It also changes alot.
